name: @smicolon/ai-kit
description: AI coding tool pack manager for Smicolon standards

scripts.build:binaries: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/ai-kit-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/ai-kit-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/ai-kit-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/ai-kit-linux-arm64
